assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Response clearly differentiates between dev clusters (Rapid channel) and prod clusters (Stable channel) throughout both checklists and provides specific validation for each

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions no SSH access, mandatory resource requests, no node pool control, and GKE-managed surge upgrades as Autopilot-specific limitations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: While it mentions checking for deprecated API usage, it only references the GKE console insights tab, not specific kubectl commands to check for deprecated APIs

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Response emphasizes mandatory resource requests multiple times, calling it the '#1 cause of post-upgrade failures' and noting pods are rejected without them

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist specifically includes PDBs, no bare pods requirement, and terminationGracePeriodSeconds limits for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify control plane version and kubectl commands to check node versions

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes comprehensive workload health checks including deployment replica counts, pod status, StatefulSets, and application validation

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends using dev clusters as canaries and includes dev validation section requiring 48+ hours of stability before prod upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response only mentions 72-hour advance warning notifications but does not mention checking the GKE release schedule for ~1 month advance notice
Post-upgrade checklist includes dedicated monitoring section covering Cloud Logging, metrics pipeline, alerting rules, and error pattern monitoring

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response only mentions maintenance exclusions for control plane upgrades ('No upgrades' and 'No minor upgrades') without recommending node-level exclusions, correctly recognizing Autopilot's managed nature
